subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! The Book standeth bewildered as to what It should mention, for doubts and idle fancies have permeated hearts and minds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه کتاب متحیر که چه ذکر نماید ظنون و اوهام در افئده و قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Jabulqa and Jabarsa, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
